headline: 5 Dividend Stocks Flashing Warning Signs
summary: A fat dividend yield can be the last thing a struggling company offers before it disappears entirely. These five income stocks are paying out more than their earnings and cash flow can support, and some have already cut once without fixing the underlying problem.
